subject: Sports
title: The Bill Russell Celtics
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Bill Russell Celtics.

hook.text: Eleven championships in thirteen years. No team in any sport has ever matched the Boston Celtics' run.

buildup.text: Bill Russell joined the Celtics in 1956 and transformed defense into an art form.

discovery.text: Russell's shot-blocking and rebounding anchored a dynasty that won titles from 1957 to 1969.

twist.text: In 1966, Russell became the first Black head coach in NBA history—while still playing.

climax.text: His rivalry with Wilt Chamberlain defined the era and elevated basketball's popularity.

punchline.text: Eleven rings. One player. The greatest winner in team sports.

quiz.question: How many NBA championships did Bill Russell win?
